calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Lyn Bura, CSR: Susan Lee.
C. Martin Gibson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Luxor Cab Company, Inc with Witness: Naomi Goodwin, present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Accident Report -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Record of Driver History --------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Witness Statement -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Estimate --------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Jessica Lee Daly as follows:
Damages/Principal $4,557.78
Prejudgment Interest $1,523.75
Costs $297.30, for a total of $6,378.83
Judgment signed in open court.
Mr. Gibson stipulated for the return of Plaintiff's Exhibits 1-4.
